de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Interface Constraint

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    Constraint.Top, EqualityConstraint
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public interface Constraint
    Abstract constraint interface for constraints offering unification of terms and joins. There are no public constructors to build up a new Constraint use the BOTTOM constraint (static final class variable) and add the needed constraints if a constraint would not be satisfiable (cycles, unification failed) the Constraint TOP is returned. TOP is as well as BOTTOM a static final class variable (means usage of singleton pattern for Constraints BOTTOM and TOP). Unsatisfiable constrains should only be representated by the TOP element.

      Find a term the given metavariable can be instantiated with which is consistent with every instantiation that satisfies this constraint (that means, the term such an instantiation substitutes the metavariable with can always be unified with the returned term).

    • Field Detail

      • TOP

        static final Constraint TOP

        unsatisfiable Constraint

        standard constraint class implementing the offered functionality

    • Method Detail

      • isBottom

        boolean isBottom()
        Deprecated. 
        returns true if Bottom
        Returns:
        true if Bottom

      • isSatisfiable

        boolean isSatisfiable()
        Deprecated. 
        a constraint being instance of this class is satisfiable. If a method realizes that an unsatisfiable Constraint would be built because of failed unification, cycle or s.th. similar it returns the singleton TOP being instance of the subclass Top
        Returns:
        true always

      • getInstantiation

        Term getInstantiation(Metavariable p_mv,
                      Services services)
        Deprecated. 
        Find a term the given metavariable can be instantiated with which is consistent with every instantiation that satisfies this constraint (that means, the term such an instantiation substitutes the metavariable with can always be unified with the returned term).
        Parameters:
        p_mv - the Metavariable
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        a term the given metavariable can be instantiated with

      • unify

        Constraint unify(Term t1,
                 Term t2,
                 TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        tries to unify the terms t1 and t2
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unified
        t2 - Term to be unified
        services - the Services providing access to the type model the parameter may be null but then the unification fails (i.e. @link Constraint#TOP is returned) when accessing the type model (e.g. for introducing intersection sorts) would be necessary).
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint with after unification of t1 and t2

      • unify

        Constraint unify(Term t1,
                 Term t2,
                 TermServices services,
                 BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        tries to unify terms t1 and t2.
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unfied
        t2 - Term to be unfied
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        unchanged - true iff the new constraint equals this one
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint with after unification of t1 and t2

      • isAsStrongAs

        boolean isAsStrongAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as strong as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "this" also satisfies "co".

      • isAsWeakAs

        boolean isAsWeakAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as weak as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "co" also satisfies "this".

      • equals

        boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj)
        Deprecated. 
        checks equality of constraints
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object

      • hashCode

        int hashCode()
        Deprecated. 
        Overrides:
        hashCode in class java.lang.Object

      • join

        Constraint join(Constraint co,
                TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        joins the given constraint with this constraint and returns the joint new constraint. Every implementing class should handle the cases co == TOP and ( co instanceof EqualityConstraint ).
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        Returns:
        the joined constraint

      • join

        Constraint join(Constraint co,
                TermServices services,
                BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        joins constraint co with this constraint and returns the joint new constraint. The BooleanContainer is used to wrap a second return value and indicates a subsumption of co by this constraint. Every implementing class should handle the cases co == TOP and ( co instanceof EqualityConstraint ).
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        unchanged - the BooleanContainers value set true, if this constraint is as strong as co
        Returns:
        the joined constraint

      • toString

        java.lang.String toString()
        Deprecated. 
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        String representation of the constraint
